description: Extract shared helper functions from the existing production-up.sh script, then create dev lifecycle scripts (dev-up.sh, dev-down.sh) and a production-down.sh for symmetry.

userStories.title: Extract shared script helpers from production-up.sh
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want common lifecycle script logic extracted into a shared helpers file so that dev and production scripts stay DRY.

Create monorepo/infra/scripts/_helpers.sh:
- Extract: check_cmd(), prerequisite validation loop, LINODE_TOKEN check, init_stack_if_missing(), configure_secret_if_missing(), kubeconfig export pattern, access info printing template
- Refactor production-up.sh to source _helpers.sh and call shared functions
- Verify production-up.sh still works identically after refactor
acceptanceCriteria: production-up.sh sources _helpers.sh and uses shared functions
production-up.sh behavior is unchanged after refactor
userStories.notes: Effort: S. Must complete before dev lifecycle scripts (TDP-004-07).

userStories.title: Create dev lifecycle scripts
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want dev-up.sh, dev-down.sh, and production-down.sh scripts so that I can easily provision and tear down the dev environment and tear down production.

Create monorepo/infra/scripts/dev-up.sh:
- Source _helpers.sh for shared functions
- Require LINODE_TOKEN environment variable
- Initialize dev stacks if missing, configure secrets interactively
- pulumi up for cluster (dev stack), then platform (dev stack)
- Export kubeconfig to ~/.kube/tdp-dev.yaml
- Print access info (cluster IP, nip.io URLs, Grafana port-forward)

Create monorepo/infra/scripts/dev-down.sh:
- Source _helpers.sh for shared functions
- pulumi destroy for platform (dev stack), then cluster (dev stack)

Create monorepo/infra/scripts/production-down.sh:
- Source _helpers.sh for shared functions
- pulumi destroy for platform (production stack), then cluster
- Fills the existing gap (production-up.sh exists but no teardown script)
acceptanceCriteria: dev-up.sh initializes dev stacks and configures secrets
dev-up.sh runs pulumi up for cluster then platform on dev stack
dev-up.sh prints access info with nip.io URLs
dev-down.sh destroys platform then cluster on dev stack
production-down.sh destroys platform then cluster on production stack
All scripts source _helpers.sh for shared logic
userStories.notes: Effort: S. Depends on US-001 (TDP-004-06) — helpers must exist first.
